mapper.sql: seii.id, seii.employee_id, seii.work_card, seii.name, seii.group_id, seii.operation_code, seii.error_msg, seii.data_status, seii.bank_account, seii.bank_name, seii.department, seii.administrative_office, seii.team, seii.station, seii.cost_center_num, seii.cost_center, seii.service_department, seii.create_time, seii.create_by, seii.update_time, seii.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.bank_account as ${tAlias}_bank_account, ${tAlias}.bank_name as ${tAlias}_bank_name, ${tAlias}.department as ${tAlias}_department, ${tAlias}.administrative_office as ${tAlias}_administrative_office, ${tAlias}.team as ${tAlias}_team, ${tAlias}.station as ${tAlias}_station, ${tAlias}.cost_center_num as ${tAlias}_cost_center_num, ${tAlias}.cost_center as ${tAlias}_cost_center, ${tAlias}.service_department as ${tAlias}_service_department, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into swm_employee_info_interface (employee_id, work_card, name, group_id, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, bank_account, bank_name, department, administrative_office, team, station, cost_center_num, cost_center, service_department, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{station,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costCenterNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costCenter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceDepartment,jdbcType=NCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update swm_employee_info_interface set employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, bank_account = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_name = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, administrative_office = #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, team = #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, station = #{station,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cost_center_num = #{costCenterNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cost_center = #{costCenter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, service_department = #{serviceDepartment,jdbcType=NCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
